title: TiDB Cloud Data Service
description: Schema representing TiDB Cloud Data Service entities including Data Apps, custom SQL-backed API endpoints, endpoint parameters, API keys, and deployment records. The Data Service enables developers to expose TiDB Cloud data via HTTPS REST endpoints backed by SQL queries.

dataAppId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the Data App by TiDB Cloud.

displayName.description: The human-readable display name of the Data App.

description.description: An optional description of the Data App's purpose and the data it exposes.

region.description: The cloud region where this Data App is deployed.

createTime.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the Data App was created.

updateTime.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the Data App was last modified.

DataSource.description: A TiDB Cloud cluster linked as a data source within a Data App.

clusterId.description: The unique identifier of the linked TiDB Cloud cluster.

clusterName.description: The display name of the linked cluster.

clusterType.description: The type of the linked cluster.

Endpoint.description: A custom SQL-backed API endpoint within a TiDB Cloud Data App that handles HTTPS requests by executing SQL against a linked cluster.

name.description: The resource name of the endpoint.

displayName.description: The human-readable display name for the endpoint.

description.description: A description of what this endpoint returns and how to call it.

path.description: The URL path for the endpoint, relative to the Data App base URL (e.g., /users/{id}).

method.description: The HTTP method this endpoint accepts.

clusterId.description: The ID of the linked cluster this endpoint queries.

sqlTemplate.description: The SQL template executed when this endpoint is called. Supports ${param_name} substitution for parameters.

tag.description: An optional label for grouping related endpoints.

params.description: The list of parameter definitions accepted by this endpoint.

EndpointSettings.description: Configuration settings controlling the behavior of a Data App endpoint.

timeout.description: Maximum SQL execution time in milliseconds before returning a timeout error.

rowLimit.description: Maximum number of rows the endpoint can return in a single response.

cacheEnabled.description: Whether response caching is enabled for GET requests to this endpoint.

cacheTtl.description: Time-to-live for cached responses in seconds.

paginationEnabled.description: Whether cursor-based pagination is enabled for result sets.

batchOperation.description: Whether this endpoint accepts batch array input for bulk operations.

EndpointParameter.description: A parameter definition for a Data App endpoint that maps to SQL template substitution variables.

name.description: The parameter name as referenced in the SQL template using ${name} syntax.

type.description: The data type of the parameter.

required.description: Whether this parameter is required for every call to the endpoint.

defaultValue.description: The default value used when the parameter is not provided by the caller.

description.description: A description of the parameter's purpose and expected format.

DataAppApiKey.description: An API key scoped to a specific Data App, used for authenticating HTTPS calls to the Data App's endpoints via HTTP Digest Authentication.

apiKeyId.description: The unique identifier of the Data App API key.

publicKey.description: The public key portion used as the username in Digest Authentication.

privateKey.description: The private key portion used as the password. Only returned at creation time.

description.description: A human-readable description identifying the purpose or owner of this key.

role.description: The permission role controlling what operations this key can perform.

rateLimitRpm.description: The maximum number of requests per minute allowed for this API key.

expiresAt.description: Optional ISO 8601 expiration timestamp after which this key will no longer be valid.

Deployment.description: A versioned deployment record of a Data App, capturing the endpoint configuration at the time of deployment.

deploymentId.description: The unique identifier of this deployment.

dataAppId.description: The ID of the Data App that was deployed.

status.description: The current status of the deployment.

createTime.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the deployment was initiated.

endTime.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the deployment completed or failed.

EndpointCallResponse.description: The standard JSON response body returned by a Data App endpoint call.

code.description: The application-level response code. 200 indicates the SQL was executed successfully.

msg.description: A human-readable message describing the response status.

EndpointCallResult.description: The data payload returned by a successful Data App endpoint call.

columns.description: The column definitions for the result set.

rows.description: The result rows returned by the SQL query.

items.description: A single result row as a key-value object.

row_affect.description: The number of rows affected by a DML statement.

row_count.description: The total number of rows returned by the query.

ResultColumn.description: A column definition in a Data App endpoint result set.

data_type.description: The SQL data type of the column (e.g., VARCHAR, INT, DATETIME).

nullable.description: Whether this column can contain NULL values.
